heading_content_part: Mobile Privacy PolicyLengkeng LabThứ Năm, 23 tháng 2, 2017Mobile Privacy PolicyHello everyone.We have no interest in your data. We build apps, you buy them or click the ads. We’re very cool with this arrangement.

decoder_heading: We Do Not Collect or Store Any Information
ident_heading: We do not collect or store any information
heading_content_part: We do not collect or store any information on your use of our apps.  We do not track your usage, location, or any other information which would tell us who uses this app.  Once our applications are installed on your phone, they do not communicate with our servers in any way.Our "Wifi Password Viewer" request Camera permission because of QRCode library which uses Camera to scan QRCode feature but we do not use this feature. We only use QRCode generation feature. So don't worry about Camera permission.

decoder_heading: We Do Not Collect or Store Any Information
ident_heading: We do not collect or store any information
heading_content_part: For our free applications, we use
Admob for mobile advertising.  This is how we make money.

decoder_heading: We Do Not Sell Any Information
ident_heading: We do not sell any information
heading_content_part: We do not sell any information regarding our users.  For our paid applications, we do not use advertising.Due to the ways the app markets work, however, we receive information regarding your store details when you purchase one of our apps.  All mobile apps receive this information (not just the apps belonging to our Apps).  However, do not collect or store this
information.  We have no interest in this information.We strongly believe that you are entitled to your own privacy. We will alwa
